# Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Ctrl + S` / `Cmd + S` | Save all pending changes (questionnaire answers) |
| `Escape` | Close any open modal or the help panel |
| `Tab` | Move focus to the next focusable element (trapped inside modals when open) |
| `Shift + Tab` | Move focus to the previous focusable element (trapped inside modals when open) |

## Navigation

| Action | How |
|--------|-----|
| Switch tabs | Click **Command Center**, **Questionnaires**, or **Decisions** in the tab bar |
| Open help panel | Click the **? Help** button in the header |
| Filter decisions | Use the search box and the priority / status dropdowns in the Decisions tab |
| Change theme | Click the **🌓** button in the header to toggle between light and dark mode |

## Tips

- The **Save All** button in the header shows a count of unsaved changes and is only enabled when there are pending edits.
- Use the **filter bar** in the Decisions tab to quickly find decisions by text, priority, or status.
- Click any command in the Command Center sidebar to see its form — the clipboard box below auto-generates the ready-to-paste command string.
- Modals can be dismissed by clicking outside the modal or pressing **Escape**.
